info.title: Nova Launch API
info.description: REST API for the Nova Launch Stellar token deployment platform.

tags.name: Authentication
tags.description: Stellar wallet-based authentication: challenge/nonce, verify/login, token refresh, and session revocation

post.summary: Request a nonce / challenge to sign with your Stellar wallet
post.description: Returns a one-time nonce that the client must sign with their Stellar private key. The nonce expires after a short TTL. Corresponds to GET /auth/nonce in the NestJS controller.

400.description: Missing or invalid publicKey query parameter

429.description: Too many nonce requests — rate limit exceeded

post.summary: Authenticate with Stellar wallet signature (verify challenge)
post.description: Verifies the Ed25519 signature over the nonce obtained from POST /auth/challenge. On success, returns a short-lived access token and a longer-lived refresh token. Corresponds to POST /auth/login in the NestJS controller.

400.description: Malformed request body — missing or invalid fields

example.message: Account is not authorised to authenticate

post.summary: Refresh access token using a valid refresh token
post.description: Accepts a non-expired refresh token and issues a new access token and rotated refresh token. The old refresh token is revoked on success.

401.description: Refresh token is expired or has been revoked

example.message: Refresh token is invalid or expired

403.description: Refresh token belongs to a suspended account

delete.description: Revokes the JWT identified by the `jti` claim in the Bearer token, effectively ending the current session. Corresponds to POST /auth/logout in the NestJS controller.

403.description: Token does not have permission to revoke this session

get.description: Returns 200 as long as the process is running.

post.description: Deploy up to 10 tokens in a single atomic operation. If any individual Stellar contract call fails, the entire batch is aborted and no database records are written. Requires a valid tenant context via the X-Tenant-ID header.

207.description: Multi-Status – some tokens deployed, some failed

400.description: Validation error or missing tenant header

422.description: All tokens in the batch failed to deploy

get.summary: Campaign statistics for a token (or global)
Stream statistics for an address or global
Streams where address is the recipient
Vaults where address is the beneficiary

post.summary: Send a test event to a webhook

BearerAuth.description: JWT access token obtained from POST /auth/verify or POST /auth/refresh

signature.description: Ed25519 signature over the nonce, base64-encoded

nonce.description: The nonce value returned by POST /auth/challenge

refreshToken.description: A valid, non-expired JWT refresh token previously issued by POST /auth/verify or POST /auth/refresh

accessToken.description: Short-lived JWT access token (Bearer). Valid for 15 minutes.

refreshToken.description: Longer-lived JWT refresh token. Valid for 7 days.

expiresIn.description: Seconds until the access token expires.

walletAddress.description: Stellar wallet address (G-address) of the authenticated user.

nonce.description: One-time nonce (UUID v4) to be signed by the wallet.

expiresAt.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) at which the nonce expires.

message.description: Full challenge message that the wallet must sign.

creator.description: Stellar G-address of the token owner

initialSupply.description: Non-negative integer supply as a decimal string

metadataUri.description: Optional IPFS or HTTPS metadata URI

tokens.description: Array of token deploy inputs (1–10 items)

error.description: Human-readable reason the token failed to deploy

succeeded.description: Tokens that were successfully deployed and persisted

failed.description: Tokens that failed, with per-item error messages
